description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot body; Price 3,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This black corset fits neatly beneath armor. As a free action, the wearer can compress herself to fit through tight spaces as though affected by a squeeze spell for up to 10 rounds per day. While using the corset’s magic, she gains a +5 bonus on Escape Artist checks. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, grease, squeeze; Cost 1,500 gp
